titleStmt.title: SII 28.155: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 155. (A.R. No. 310 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, Second prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal approval to the grant of land for raising a flower-garden to supply flowers to the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār, named Tillaipperumāḷ, the name of the garden and for yielding the income to pay the wages (koṟṟu) to 4 nandavaṉakkuḍi (i.e) those that tend the garden, after purchasing the said plots of land in the name of (anya-nāmakaraṇattu) Uḻaichchāṇaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ Yajñēśvaraṉ by one Perumūr-uḍaiyāṉ-araiyaṉ (the portion of the inscription containing his name is damaged).

It is noteworthy that in each of this series of inscriptions dealing with the setting up of flower-gardens, each person engaged to tend the garden was enjoined to supply one kuṟuṇi and 4 nāḻi of flowers daily and as wages he was authorised to be paid again one kuṟuṇi and 4 nāḻi of paddy.

The present inscription also says that the maḍaṅgu in respect of the land granted will be borne by the ūr (ūrir-kaḻikkavum). [The annual Report for Epigraphy against this number translates the term as the excess (maḍakku) in measurement be deducted from the village (accounts). This translation does not seem to fit the context]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 1āvatu nāḷ Āṟiṉāl prasādam cetu Aruḷi vanta ceyyumpaṭippaṭi Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc cātti Aruḷa tiruppaḷḷittāmat tirunantavaṉamākap perumuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ ṭaiyāṉāṉa Apa
miyarāyaṉ Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc cātti Aruḷa rājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭu perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai civapuriyāṉa rājentracoḻanallūril tillaipperumāḷ Eṉṉum perāl ceyvitta tirunantavaṉam Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ yajñeśvaraṉ periṉ Anyanāmakaraṇattu vilaikoṇṭa tirucciṟṟam
palavatikku kiḻakku kaṇavati vāykkālukku teṟku 3 100 9 10 1 catirattu rūpāy � kiḻakku mukkāl ciṟapput tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷil kaḻaṉivāyuṭaiyāṉ vaḷḷap periyāṉ pakkal vilaikoṇṭa Ivvatikku kiḻakku Ivvāykkālukku teṟkku 1kū1 catirattu rūpāy �(1/4) Āka tirunantakollai nūṟṟirurupatteṭṭukkuḻi ko
ṇṭatu Oru māvāka vanta rūpāy mūṉṟumā� kiḻakku mukkāl Inṉila muṉṟumā muntirikai kiḻ mukkālile tirunantavaṉañ ceyyavum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ per nālvarkku koṟṟukku per Oṉṟukku nāḷ Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyāka vaṉta nellukku koṇṭuviṭṭa Ivvūrk kiḻppiṭākai kiṭāraṅkoṇṭa coḻapperiḷamai nāṭṭu
tiruvekkaḷamāṉa jaṉaṉātanallūrppāl tirucciṟṟampalavatikku kiḻakku Uttamacoḻavāykkālukku teṟku 4kū1 catirattu Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ yajñeśvaraṉ peril Anyanāmakaraṇattāl vilaikoṇṭa nilattukku Ellai vācciyaṉ poṉṉampalattāṭi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nilat
tukku kiḻakkum tirukāḷiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukkut teṟkkum nilattukku meṟkum kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum Ivvicainta nāṉkellaiyi kumāramaṅkalamāṉa tillaiaḻaka nallūril jaṉanātavatikku kiḻakku coḻa lukku teṟku rūpāy kū1 catirattu
m [�cati]rattum nilattiṉukkellai potup peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār palavaravai nilattiṉukku kiḻakkum teṟkum peruṅkavuciyaṉ tillaiyār kulā ka [ ]yaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukku meṟkum vaitoṭaṉ naṭṭaṉ kantaṉ nilattukku � nilattil mel talaiyil kuḷa
ttiṟcempātiyāl vaṉta rūpāy 1mukkālm nattam rūpāy (1/4)mukkālm Āka rūpāy (1/4) Āka nūṟṟirupatteṭṭu kuḻi koṇṭatu Orumāvāka vanta rūpāy (1/2)[�]m Innilam Araiye Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷukku jivitamāvutākavum Āka rūpāy mukkālm �kiśakku mukkāl Innila mukkāle kāṇi muntirikai ṭaiyār palavaravai
oṭuṅ kūṭṭavum Innilattāl vanta maṭaṅku Ūriṟ kaḻikkavum kaṭavutākavum nāḷ Oṉṟukku per Oṉṟukku kuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyāka vaṉta tiruppaḷḷittāmam tiruppūmaṇṭapattu mutalāka nāḷtoṟum Aḷakkavum kaṭavatāka Ippaṭi peṟaveṇumenṟu vilāṭarāyaṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi tiruvāy mo
ḻintaruḷi tirumantraolai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuti tiṭṭa ceyyumpaṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu [§]
Digital edition of SII 28.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
